title: Costochondritis
license_notes: Use as public patient-education source support. Avoid verbatim copying into primitives.
supports: Costochondritis is inflammation where ribs join the breastbone and can cause chest wall pain.
Supportive care may include rest, avoiding painful activity, and clinician-directed pain control.
Cardiac, pulmonary embolism, shortness of breath, exertional symptoms, trauma, fever, or diagnostic uncertainty require separate evaluation.
